# Author-swap restore hook tests — require gh account switch credentials.
# Permanently deselected from the ubuntu Python suite (issue #21 protocol).
# No credential wiring on CI runners for gh auth switch / restore paths.

packages/claude-dev-env/hooks/blocking/test_gh_pr_author_restore.py::test_main_no_op_when_state_file_missing_original_account
packages/claude-dev-env/hooks/blocking/test_gh_pr_author_restore.py::test_main_deletes_state_file_when_original_account_wrong_type
